title: derris confertiflora
intro: Derris confertiflora, also known as the "Tora tree" or "Derris", is a plant native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Derris confertiflora include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Derris confertiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or powder, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a paste or ointment.
